description: baggit have come up with this compact jute bag that's not just a season essential but a fashion must-have. Designed in a rich dark hue, this bag is just right for colour blocking. Alternatively, add a quirky twist to your work wear with this piece!Height: 45 cmWidth: 23 cmDepth: 8 cmMade of jute for durability; has a flap with a zippered pocket under itOne main zippered compartment with a zippered separator and a zippered pocket insideCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
